name: Biscotti D'amaretti
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup almonds, finely chopped and toasted
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour and baking powder.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat together the butter and sugar until well blended.
3. Beat in the eggs, lemon peel, almond extract, and saffron. Mix in the flour mixture until thoroughly combined.
4. Stir in the chopped almonds.
5. Divide the dough into two portions.
6. Shape each portion into a 12 x 2 x 1-inch loaf.
7. Place the loaves on a lightly greased cookie sheet, about 6 inches apart.
8. Beat the egg white until foamy and brush over the tops of the loaves.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 20 to 25 minutes or until light brown.
10. Allow cooling on the cookie sheet for about 1 hour.
11. Cut each loaf diagonally into 1/2-inch thick slices.
12. Place the sliced cookies, cut side down, back onto the cookie sheet.
13. Bake in a preheated oven at 325°F for an additional 10 minutes or until dry and crisp.
14. Remove from the oven and allow cooling on a wire rack.
These cookies are best enjoyed after several days when slightly softened. Store in a paper bag for short-term storage, or place in a covered container for longer storage. Makes about 36 cookies.
